executives.name: Check Kian Low
executives.background: Mr. Low has served as a director since 2006. He is a co-founder of NewSmith Capital Partners LLP and was previously a partner at Goldman Sachs, where he served as Chairman of Goldman Sachs (Asia).

executives.name: Dominic Barton
executives.background: Dominic was appointed Chairman in 2022. He was previously the Global Managing Partner of McKinsey & Company and served as Canada's Ambassador to China.
